task: Find out what to do when I lose an item on a bus on us.megabus.
final_result_response:
Here's what you should do if you lose an item on a Megabus bus, according to the us.megabus.com Help page (https://us.megabus.com/help):

**What To Do If You Lost an Item on the Bus:**

1. **Fill out the Lost and Found form** — A lost item inquiry must be reported to Megabus's Lost and Found department by filling out the form at https://us.megabus.com/contact-us.

2. **Provide all necessary details** — Once you submit the required information about the lost item, it will be entered into their system for processing by the Lost and Found department.

3. **Allow several days for a response** — The response time may take several days, as an investigation must be completed to locate the item.

4. **Megabus will do their best** — Megabus makes every attempt to return lost items to their rightful owners and will assist with retrieval to the best of their ability.

judge.reasoning:
**Task Understanding:** The user wanted to find out what to do when losing an item on a Megabus bus, by looking up the information on us.megabus.com. A successful completion would show the relevant instructions from the website.

**Output Assessment:** The agent navigated to us.megabus.com, located the Help/FAQ section, clicked on the "What do I do if I lost an item on the bus?" dropdown, and extracted the full instructional text. It returned a clear 4-point summary matching the content from the page: fill out the Lost and Found form, provide item details, allow several days for response, and Megabus will do their best to return the item.

**Evidence:** Step 9 (browser_analyze_state) directly confirms the agent read the correct FAQ answer: "If an item is lost on a bus, a lost item inquiry must be reported to our lost and found department by filling out this form... The time frame of response may take several days... Megabus makes every attempt to return lost items to their rightful owners." The agent's final response accurately paraphrases this content. The execution integrity status is "healthy" with no errors, and the agent meaningfully interacted with the browser.

**Summary:** The agent successfully navigated to us.megabus.com, found and clicked the relevant FAQ item about lost items, and accurately extracted and presented the instructions. Step 9 confirms the agent read the exact content that matches the final response.
